title: Update c/image to match CRI-O master
body:
Update our C/Image to keep the version consistent with CRI-O. Not strictly necessary, but eases any pain that might happen when we start integrating the two.

Ref: https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1352

comments.body: LGTM, all green except F27 Podman test which I think is an expected issue due to entrypoint fun atm.
